update.cancelDownloadConfirmMessage: The update download will stop and the downloaded data will be discarded. You can download it again later.

databasesConfig.title: Databases Config
databasesConfig.subtitle: Configure default query behavior and connection settings for your databases.

queryTimeout.label: Query Timeout
queryTimeout.desc: Maximum time (in seconds) to wait before cancelling a running query

showSystemDatabases.label: Show System Databases
showSystemDatabases.desc: Display system databases (master, model, msdb, tempdb) in the Explorer tree

selectTopRowsCount.label: Select Top Rows Count
selectTopRowsCount.desc: Number of rows to return when using "Select Top Rows" from the table context menu

copyJsonFormatted.label: Copy JSON as Formatted Text
copyJsonFormatted.desc: When copying a JSON value from the result viewer, format it with indentation. Disable to copy compact, single-line JSON

autoIncludeExecutionPlan.label: Auto Include Execution Plan
autoIncludeExecutionPlan.desc: Automatically generate and display the execution plan for every query that is run

autoIncludeClientStatistics.label: Auto Include Client Statistics
autoIncludeClientStatistics.desc: Automatically collect and display client statistics for every query that is run

askBeforeIncludingSecrets.label: Ask Before Including Secrets
askBeforeIncludingSecrets.desc: Show a confirmation prompt each time you save a comparison report, asking whether to include connection passwords and file paths in the exported JSON

includeSecretsByDefault.label: Include Secrets by Default
includeSecretsByDefault.desc: Pre-select "include connection secrets" in the export confirmation dialog. Has no effect when the prompt is disabled — the setting is used directly instead

mysqlTools.title: MySQL Client Tools
mysqlTools.subtitle: Optional paths to the mysqldump and mysql binaries used for MySQL backup and restore. Leave blank to use the binaries found on your system PATH. When neither is available, a built-in pure-JS engine is used instead.

mysqldumpPath.label: mysqldump Path
mysqldumpPath.desc: Full path to the mysqldump executable used for MySQL backups

mysqlClientPath.label: mysql Client Path
mysqlClientPath.desc: Full path to the mysql client executable used for MySQL restores

test.label: Detected Tools
test.desc: Run a check to verify the configured binaries are reachable

postgresTools.title: PostgreSQL Client Tools
postgresTools.subtitle: Optional paths to the pg_dump, pg_restore and psql binaries used for PostgreSQL backup and restore. Leave blank to use the binaries found on your system PATH. These tools are required for Postgres backup and restore.

pgDumpPath.label: pg_dump Path
pgDumpPath.desc: Full path to the pg_dump executable used for PostgreSQL backups

pgRestorePath.label: pg_restore Path
pgRestorePath.desc: Full path to the pg_restore executable used for custom/tar/directory restores

psqlPath.label: psql Path
psqlPath.desc: Full path to the psql executable used for plain-format restores

test.label: Detected Tools
test.desc: Run a check to verify the configured binaries are reachable

mongoTools.title: MongoDB Database Tools
mongoTools.subtitle: Optional paths to the mongodump and mongorestore binaries used for MongoDB backup and restore. Leave blank to use the binaries found on your system PATH. When the tools are missing, Spiral falls back to a built-in JSON engine.

mongodumpPath.label: mongodump Path
mongodumpPath.desc: Full path to the mongodump executable used for MongoDB backups

mongorestorePath.label: mongorestore Path
mongorestorePath.desc: Full path to the mongorestore executable used for restoring MongoDB archives

resultsViewConfig.title: Results View Config
resultsViewConfig.subtitle: Configure how query results are displayed and formatted.

uppercaseColumnHeaders.label: Uppercase Column Headers
uppercaseColumnHeaders.desc: Display column names in the results table in uppercase instead of their original casing

showKeyIconsInResults.label: Show Key Icons in Column Headers
showKeyIconsInResults.desc: Show a key icon next to column names that are primary keys or foreign keys when browsing table data

useInteractiveTables.label: Use Interactive Tables
useInteractiveTables.desc: Allow interacting with table data, including creating, deleting, sorting rows and enhanced look & feel

ai.title: AI Settings
ai.subtitle: Manage AI models and configure your Hugging Face access token.

hfToken.label: Hugging Face Token
hfToken.desc: Required to download AI models. Get a free token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens

models.title: Models
models.authHint: Add your Hugging Face token above to authenticate.

userProfile.title: User Profile
userProfile.subtitle: Manage your profile, password, and application lock settings.
userProfile.privacyNote: All information is stored locally on your device and is never sent to anyone or anywhere.
userProfile.displayNameDesc: A name shown as a tooltip on your profile icon in the side navigation.

password.noPasswordDesc: Protect the app with a password to prevent unauthorized access.
password.hasPasswordDesc: Your application is protected with a password.
password.removeDesc: Enter your current password to confirm removal.
password.removeWarning: Warning: Removing your password will decrypt all stored connection passwords and save them as plain text.
password.recoveryNote: Forgot your password? You can reset the application by clearing the app data from your operating system's application data directory.

lockOnStartup.label: Lock on Startup
lockOnStartup.desc: Require password entry each time the application starts.

lockOnInactivity.label: Lock on Inactivity
lockOnInactivity.desc: Automatically lock the application after a period of inactivity.

lockOnMinimize.label: Lock when Minimized
lockOnMinimize.desc: Lock the application whenever the window is minimized to the taskbar or dock.

inactivityTimeout.label: Inactivity Timeout
inactivityTimeout.desc: Minutes of inactivity before the application locks.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Configure your workspace preferences and core application behavior.

language.label: Language
language.desc: Select the display language for the application interface

environments.label: Manage Environments
environments.desc: Define named environments that can be assigned to connections and query tabs.
environments.tableSubtitle: Use environments to highlight risky targets and control query safeguards.

fields.name: Name
fields.criticalHint:
Critical environments require confirmation before potentially unsafe query execution.
Even with this option on, sometimes software makes mistakes. Running code that makes changes to your data is your responsibility and you should always verify the code before execution.

editor.subtitle: Choose a recognizable name, color, and risk level.

deleteInUse.title: Delete Environment
deleteInUse.message_one: "{{name}}" is assigned to {{count}} connection. Deleting it will clear that assignment. Continue?
deleteInUse.message_other: "{{name}}" is assigned to {{count}} connections. Deleting it will clear those assignments. Continue?

defaultConnectionSort.label: Default Connection Sort
defaultConnectionSort.desc: Initial sort order applied to the connections list when the application loads

hfToken.label: Hugging Face Token
hfToken.desc: Required to download AI models. Get a free token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens

likeConfetti.label: I like confetti
likeConfetti.desc: Show occasional confetti on successful operations

tipsAndTricks.label: Tips & Tricks
tipsAndTricks.desc: Show helpful tips and tricks while you work

appUpdate.label: Application Update
appUpdate.desc: Check for and install the latest version of Spiral

analytics.label: Usage Analytics
analytics.desc: Spiral uses Google Analytics to understand how the app is used so we can make it better. No personal information is collected, and no connection details or passwords are ever sent. You can opt out at any time.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize the visual style and interface layout of the application.

selectedTheme.title: Selected Theme
selectedTheme.desc: Choose a specific theme from the full theme library

syntaxHighlighting.title: Syntax Highlighting
syntaxHighlighting.desc: Enable colorful code in the query editor

showGridLines.title: Show Grid Lines
showGridLines.desc: Display borders between rows and columns in data view

hideSideNav.title: Hide Side Navigation Bar
hideSideNav.desc: Hide the left-side page navigation icons until they are shown again from the View menu

erdBackground.title: ERD Default Background
erdBackground.desc: Default background style for newly created ERD diagrams

customTitlebar.title: Custom Title Bar
customTitlebar.desc: Use the top bar as the window title bar, enabling drag and native-style window controls. Requires a restart to apply.

enableAnimations.title: Enable Animations
enableAnimations.desc: Show motion effects such as dialog entry transitions across the application

showToolbarTextButtons.title: Show Toolbar Text Buttons
showToolbarTextButtons.desc: Display text labels next to toolbar icons in the Explorer page

darkTerminals.title: Dark Terminals
darkTerminals.desc: Keep the Redis and MongoDB terminal background dark instead of matching the selected theme colors

glassEffectColor.title: Glass Effect Color
glassEffectColor.desc: Adjust the glowing color in the side navigation panel.

appearance.restartRequired: A restart is required to apply this change.

deleteRedisKey.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the key "{{keyName}}"? This action cannot be undone.

deleteRedisPrefix.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all keys under the prefix "{{prefix}}:"? This action cannot be undone.

redisDashboard.maintenanceNote: Use these commands to manage your Redis server. Flush commands are irreversible.

bgsave.label: BGSAVE
bgsave.confirmMessage: This will trigger an asynchronous RDB snapshot to disk. Continue?

bgrewriteaof.label: BGREWRITEAOF
bgrewriteaof.confirmMessage: This will trigger an asynchronous AOF rewrite in the background. Continue?

memoryPurge.label: MEMORY PURGE
memoryPurge.confirmMessage: This will attempt to release fragmented memory back to the OS allocator. Continue?

slowlogReset.label: SLOWLOG RESET
slowlogReset.confirmMessage: This will permanently clear the slow query log. Continue?

flushdb.label: FLUSHDB db{{dbIndex}}
flushdb.confirmMessage: ⚠ This will permanently delete ALL keys in database {{dbIndex}}. This action cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure?

flushall.label: FLUSHALL
flushall.confirmMessage: ⚠ This will permanently delete ALL keys in ALL databases on this Redis server. This action cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure?

fields.name: Name
fields.autoConnectDesc: Automatically connect to this database when the application starts
fields.eagerLoadingDesc: Pre-load all databases, tables, views, stored procedures and functions in the background after connecting, for instant tree navigation
fields.backgroundAutoRefreshDesc: Silently watch expanded tree areas for schema changes and refresh them automatically without interrupting your workflow
fields.redisHideEmptyDatabasesDesc: Show only Redis logical databases that contain at least one key. Refresh the database list to reveal databases once they have values.
fields.sshPassphrasePlaceholder: Leave empty if key has no passphrase
fields.mongodbSrvEnable: Use SRV record (mongodb+srv://) — required for Atlas and most cloud clusters
fields.mongodbUriHint: Supply a full URI to override all other fields, or leave blank and fill in the fields below
fields.postgresSslModeAllow: allow — encrypt only if the server requires it
fields.postgresSslModeVerifyCa: verify-ca — encrypt and verify the certificate
fields.postgresSslModeVerifyFull: verify-full — verify the certificate and hostname
fields.environmentDesc: Assign an environment label to this connection.

syncConfirmDialog.warningSingle: This will apply the selected finding to {{receiverName}}. This action cannot be automatically undone unless you generate a revert script below.
syncConfirmDialog.createRevertScript: Generate a revert script (saved before sync executes)
